policy.clause: Prior to the development of guidance on red-team testing standards by NIST ... this description shall include the results of any red-team testing that the company has conducted relating to lowering the barrier to entry for the development, acquisition, and use of biological weapons by non-state actors; the discovery of software vulnerabilities and development of associated exploits; the use of software or tools to influence real or virtual events; the possibility for self-replication or propagation; and associated measures to meet safety objectives.
policy.source_title: Safe, Secure, and Trustworthy Development and Use of Artificial Intelligence
